name: Card
description: A Ramp physical or virtual corporate card.

fields.name: last_four
fields.description: Last four digits of the card number.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Card state: ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, TERMINATED, UNACTIVATED.

fields.name: is_physical
fields.description: True if physical card, false if virtual.

fields.name: interval
fields.description: Limit interval: DAILY, WEEKLY, MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, YEARLY, TOTAL.
